_description: Quarterly Rocks™ Planning entries (Wickman 90-Day-World) for Scale path. Append-only — one entry per quarter. Captures: Rocks set for next quarter (3-7 company-level), V/TO™ refresh notes, Org-Checkup™ score, Issues IDS-d this quarter, vector decisions if in 3.3/3.4. Equivalent to PMF/GTM quarterly_rebuild_log but EOS™-flavored when subphase ≥ 3.2.

note: Example row — delete on first real Quarterly Rebuild.
